title: Pricing Analyst
description: Liberty Mutual, one of America's largest insurance companies, seeks a Pricing Analyst to support our insurance products and rate development. Working fully remote, you'll analyze actuarial data, conduct pricing studies, and contribute to rate-setting strategies. This role combines data analysis with business acumen in the insurance industry.
responsibilities: Analyze rating data and develop loss trend projections
Support actuarial teams with pricing model development
Prepare pricing analyses and rate justification documentation
Conduct competitor and market research for pricing strategy
Maintain pricing databases and analytical tools
Present findings and recommendations to management

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Actuarial Science, Mathematics, Statistics, or related field
skills: Proficiency in Excel and data analysis tools

benefits: Health, dental, vision, and life insurance
Professional development and actuarial exam support
